title: Custom eggless cakes for Marsden Park — without the Parramatta drive
summary:
Custom eggless cakes for Marsden Park and Schofields. You no longer need to drive to Parramatta.

We opened at Riverstone Shopping Centre in December 2024 — which means North West Sydney finally has a custom eggless bakery that's actually close. Every cake we make is 100% eggless. Not some cakes. Every single one.

Six sizes, 15 flavours, any design. Minimum 48 hours notice. Pickup from Riverstone. Free parking.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.

custom eggless bakery North West Sydney
custom eggless cake without driving to Parramatta
